content.text:
Now I can clearly see atom O:44 (oxygen, index 44) in the molecule. From this zoomed-in view, I can identify its covalent connections:

Atom O:44 is connected to:
- C:45 (carbon, index 45) - visible as a yellow/gold atom directly bonded to O:44
- N:41 (nitrogen, index 41) - visible as a blue atom directly bonded to O:44  
- S:42 (sulfur, index 42) - visible as a yellow/gold atom directly bonded to O:44

The bonds are clearly visible as lines connecting these atoms to O:44.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file name "geomconf_1647.xyz", I can determine that the geomconf_index is 1647.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 44 (O) are:
- Atom 45 (C)
- Atom 41 (N) 
- Atom 42 (S)

And the geomconf_index is 1647.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 44, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
